title: Source-register record (one JSON object per line; lanes write register.<lane>.jsonl)

nation_id.description: Canonical Nation slug from sources/NATIONS.md when Nation-specific

status.description: Initial status only — later transitions are register-status events in the access log; the tool computes effective status. 'dead' = an observed 404/410 at a known-good URL; 'unresolved-baseline' = a baseline-report item whose official URL could not be re-located (NOT evidence a public URL ever existed; no archive fallback without human authorization).

duplicate_of.description: source_id of canonical record when status=duplicate

baseline_id.description: Stable ID of the pnw-research baseline inventory item this record verifies (see sources/baseline-inventory.md)

official_source.description: Hosted by the issuing entity itself (vs aggregator/secondary)

publication_intent.description: Evidence the document was deliberately published (e.g. 'linked from official codes page')
